title: Cosetek withdrawals failing
author: Plus_Research_6574
selftext:
Cos withdrawals failing… time to make the swap 

The new cos! Join early and build your team

Is COS finished?!

Audio clips and the promotions flying in meaning it’s pretty much had it’s time, but that’s just speculation. Some withdrawals are failing today after the promotion they’ve just had on.

Jump is the newest platform going. Videos and content available for anyone that wants to get in touch. Made my deposit back already and money building nicely. More than happy to talk you through it all. 

https://jumptdd.top/#/register?code=P79O7N


Register with the link and let’s make you some money.

DM me if you join and I will add you to the what’s app group for all information you need to start. Will have access to the support WhatsApp where we can all help each other achieve 


Invite a friend to the first event, and your friend will receive 200 USDT trial gold for 24 hours.

The second activity, the first recharge can get 5% of the recharge amount.

In the third activity, you can sign in every day. If you sign in continuously, you can get additional rewards

The fourth activity is to invite a friend to become VIP1, and you will be invited to the lucky wheel and can draw prizes on the lucky wheel.

The fourth activity is long-term effective.

comments.author: Old-Statistician-281
comments.body:
